prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约7376名→9065名→15687名→15387名→11635名，整体呈先降后升的V型走势；2023年位次大幅后移至15687名后，2024–2025年连 续两年明显前移，2025年回升至11635名，较2023年累计前移约4052名，显示该校在河北物理类考生中的吸引力正在恢复；本省物理类计划2021年155人、2022年 159人、2023年156人、2024年152人、2025年154人，2026年计划141人，较2025年减少13人（缩招约8.4%），缩招将加剧竞争，推动最低位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工 程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第41名，近年排名稳定在40–43名区间，属于全国顶尖211院校，工科实力突出；2026年声誉评价偏负面（曾发 生实验室安全事故），但抖音综合热度排名第45位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，报考关注度不低；未见明显投档断档记录；系统科学A+（全国第一）、交通运 输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，其中系统科学为全国顶尖，交通运输、信息通信为强势学科，与该校 招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等该校核心专业大类社会热度为高热推荐或推荐，持续吸引高分考生；河北省2026年普通高考 总人数约60.98万，较2025年（约60.68万）略有增加，物理类估算约36.5万人，竞争基数小幅扩大；省控线物理类本科批从2024年448分升至2025年459分，呈上升趋势；北京交通大学位于北京市，对河北考生具有天然的地域吸引力（距离近、交通便利），该校在河北招生规模较大（物理类常年150人左右），属于河北考生报考京区高校 的重要选择。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11635名、2026年计划缩招约8.4%（推动位次前移）、考生总数小幅增加及省控线上涨（竞争略加剧）、学校声誉偏负面但抖 音热度尚可、优势学科对工科考生吸引力强等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基础上继续前移；预测最低位次约11016名，区间10516–11516名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程等）
- 理科试验班类（詹天佑试点班信息类/智能类）
- 电子信息类（含通信工程、电子科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（智能系统与智能制造）
- 交通运输类（含交通运输、交通工程、智能运输工程等）
- 理科试验班（含系统科学与工程、信息与计算科学、统计学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济管理试验班（含经济学、金融学、物流管理、信息管理与信息系统）
- 机器人工程（知行创新班）
- 通信工程（知行创新班院士班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约11016名，区间10516–11516名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如10500名以内）可重点冲击计算 机类、詹天佑试点班等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（11500名左右）建议以二档交通运输类、自动化类为主，三档经济管理试验班作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 7376 → 9065 → 15687 → 15387 → 11635, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing and then increasing; after a significant drop to 15687 in 2023, rankings moved up noticeably for two consecutive years in 2024–2025, recovering to 11635 in 2025, a cumulative improvement of about 4052 positions compared to 2023, indicating that the university's appeal among Hebei Physics Category candidates is recovering; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 155 in 2021, 159 in 2022, 156 in 2023, 152 in 2024, and 154 in 2025, with the 2026 plan at 141, a decrease of 13 (about 8.4%) from 2025, which will intensify competition and push the minimum ranking upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 41st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 40–43 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 institutions with outstanding engineering strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to a past laboratory safety incident), but its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 45th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; no significant admission gaps recorded; System Science A+ (first nationally), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above, with System Science being nationally top-tier, and Transportation, Information and Communication as strong disciplines, closely matching the university's enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geographic Location
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are socially rated as highly recommended or recommended, consistently attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of Hebei general college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (about 606,800), with an estimated 365,000 in the Physics Category, leading to a modest expansion of the competition base; the provincial control line for the Physics Category undergraduate batch rose from 448 in 2024 to 459 in 2025, showing an upward trend; Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, offering natural geographic appeal to Hebei candidates (close distance, convenient transportation), and its enrollment scale in Hebei is large (around 150 in the Physics Category annually), making it an important choice for Hebei candidates applying to Beijing-area universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11635, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 8.4% (pushing rankings upward), a slight increase in total candidates and a rise in the provincial control line (slightly intensifying competition), a somewhat negative reputation but decent Douyin popularity, and strong appeal of advantageous disciplines to engineering candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will continue to move upward from 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11016, with a range of 10516–11516.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class Information/Smart Category)
- Electronic Information (including Communication Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation (Intelligent Systems and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Transportation (including Transportation, Traffic Engineering, Intelligent Transportation Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (including Systems Science and Engineering, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Economics, Finance, Logistics Management, Information Management and Information Systems)
- Robotics Engineering (Zhixing Innovation Class)
- Communication Engineering (Zhixing Innovation Class Academician Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 11016, range 10516–11516. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; those with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 10500) can prioritize top Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class; those near the upper bound (around 11500) are advised to mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Transportation and Automation, with Tier 3 Economics and Management Experimental Class as a safe choice.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次分别为约979名→1143名→2172名→2651名→2906名，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约1927名；2025年基准约2906名，较2024年继续后 移255名，显示该校在历史类考生中的竞争热度持续下降；本省历史类计划2021–2023年均为10人，2024年增至18人，2025年略降至16人，2026年计划20人 ，较2025年增加4人（扩招25%），扩招将缓解竞争压力，推动最低位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第41名，属于全国顶尖211 院校，但作为理工类院校，对历史类考生的吸引力相对有限；2026年声誉评价偏负面（实验室安全事故），抖音热度较热（排名45），但历史类考生关注度通常 低于物理类；未见明显投档断档记录；该校优势学科集中在工科（系统科学A+、交通运输工程A等），历史类招生专业（法学、新闻传播学、建筑类、文科试验 班等）与优势学科关联度较低，学科评估支撑有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度为分化观望（推荐与劝退并存），新闻传播学为明显劝退（受张雪峰言论影响较大）；河北省2026年历史类考生估算约24.5万人，较2025年24.37万人略有增加；省控线历史类本科批从2024年449分升至2025年477分，上升明显，反映整体竞争加剧；北京交通大学位于北京市，对河北历史类考生仍具地域吸引力，但该校历史类招生专业较少（仅4–5个），选择空间有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2906名、2026 年计划扩招25%（推动位次后移）、历史类考生总数小幅增加及省控线上涨（竞争略加剧）、法学与新闻传播专业热度分化/劝退等因素，预计2026年历史类最低位次在2025年基础 上继续后移；预测最低位次约3322名，区间2822–3822名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 文科试验班类（经济管理人才试点班，含工商管理、会计学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 新闻传播学类（卓越人才拔尖班，含网络与新媒体、国际新闻与传播）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 979 → 1143 → 2172 → 2651 → 2906, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1927 places over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2906, continuing to shift backward by 255 places compared to 2024, indicating a sustained decline in competition intensity among History Category candidates for this university; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 10 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 18 in 2024, slightly decreased to 16 in 2025, and planned at 20 for 2026, an increase of 4 students (25% expansion) compared to 2025, which will alleviate competition pressure and push the minimum ranking further backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 41st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier 211 institutions nationwide, but as a science and engineering university, its appeal to History Category candidates is relatively limited; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (laboratory safety incident), with relatively high Douyin popularity (ranked 45th), but attention from History Category candidates is usually lower than that from Science Category candidates; no significant enrollment gaps recorded; the university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (System Science A+, Transportation Engineering A, etc.), while the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Journalism and Communication, Architecture, Liberal Arts Experimental Class, etc.) have low correlation with these advantageous disciplines, providing limited disciplinary evaluation support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a divided social popularity (both recommended and discouraged), Journalism and Communication is significantly discouraged (heavily influenced by Zhang Xuefeng's remarks); the estimated number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province for 2026 is about 245,000, a slight increase from 243,700 in 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 449 in 2024 to 477 in 2025, a significant increase, reflecting intensified overall competition; Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, still regionally attractive to Hebei History Category candidates, but the university offers few History Category majors (only 4–5), limiting choice.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2906, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 25% (pushing rankings backward), a slight increase in the total number of History Category candidates and the rise in the provincial control line (slightly intensified competition), and the divided/discouraged popularity of Law and Journalism and Communication majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3322, with a range of 2822–3822.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economic Management Talent Pilot Class, including Business Administration, Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Journalism and Communication (Outstanding Talent Top Class, including Network and New Media, International Journalism and Communication)
- Architecture (Outstanding Talent Top Class, including Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Network and New Media (Outstanding Talent Top Class)
- Marxist Theory (Humanities and Social Sciences Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3322, range 2822–3822. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as reach and Tier 3 as safety; those significantly above the lower bound (e.g., within 2800) can prioritize Tier 1 majors like Law and Liberal Arts Experimental Class; those near the upper bound (around 3800) should consider Tier 3 majors as safety choices.
